tagline: A soul-reaper economy where spiritual pressure hierarchies, Zanpakuto relationships, and Quincy adaptation cycles determine shinigami and arrancar combat outcomes.
visualizationReason: Bleach is defined by Zanpakuto counter relationships, Bankai-level power scaling, and Kido counter-systems — the counter-tree maps how sword releases, spiritual pressure hierarchies, and Quincy adaptations counter each other in Soul Society combat.

headerFlavor.loreQuote: If you only carry the weight of your blade, you will never understand the weight of your soul.
headerFlavor.sysWarning: // [SYS_OP]: SOUL SOCIETY NETWORK ACTIVE — ZANPAKUTO COUNTER INTELLIGENCE LOADED

introductionSummary: Bleach operates as a soul-reaper spiritual economy: Ichigo's Substitute Shinigami role, the Gotei 13's spiritual pressure hierarchy, and the Arrancar/Hollow power scaling create a combat system where spiritual energy output determines dominance and Zanpakuto counter relationships form the rock-paper-scissors of combat.

aiInsights.casual: Bleach is about a teenager who can see ghosts, becomes a soul reaper, fights hollows, and eventually takes on the entire Soul Society when they try to execute his friend.
aiInsights.deep: The Bleach power system is a spiritual energy economy: one's Reiatsu (spiritual pressure) determines their place in the hierarchy, and combat outcomes are determined by who can project more spiritual energy while exploiting elemental/ability counters.

powerSystem.name: Reiatsu (Spiritual Pressure)
powerSystem.subtitle: Spiritual Energy Output Hierarchy
powerSystem.loreDesc: The foundational combat resource in Bleach: every soul reaper, hollow, and quincy has a Reiatsu level that determines their place in the hierarchy and their combat effectiveness.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A capped personal resource that determines combat matchups — higher Reiatsu generally wins unless counters are exploited.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Yamamoto's Reiatsu so overwhelming that simply activating his Bankai changed the temperature of the entire Soul Society.

powerSystem.name: Zanpakuto
powerSystem.subtitle: Sword Soul Bond System
powerSystem.loreDesc: The sword that is a soul reaper's primary weapon and partner — a Zanpakuto has a name, personality, and combat abilities that reflect its wielder's spiritual signature.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A bonded-weapon capability system where the sword and wielder's personalities interact to determine combat output.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Ichigo's Bankai Tensa Zangetsu revealing his true Zanpakuto as a dual-nature being.

powerSystem.name: Bankai
powerSystem.subtitle: Final Release Form
powerSystem.loreDesc: The Zanpakuto's final release form, available only to captains — Bankai multiplies the wielder's combat capability by 5-10x.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A maximum-output combat mode that represents the highest capability state available to a Shinigami.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Byakuya's Bankai Senbonzakura Kageyoshi — 100 million blades from a single sword.

powerSystem.name: Hollowfication
powerSystem.subtitle: Soul Corruption Power Amplification
powerSystem.loreDesc: When a Shinigami becomes corrupted by hollow power, they gain hollow abilities on top of their shinigami powers.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A dual-capability-stack system where hollow corruption adds an additional combat mode on top of existing shinigami capabilities.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Ichigo's hollow mask appearing against Ulquiorra — revealing his hollow half as a separate combat entity.

rankings.topTierLore: The Head Captain Yama and Espada Numero 1 Starrk represent the highest Reiatsu output in their respective systems.
rankings.topTierSystem: Maximum-output nodes whose spiritual pressure alone exceeds the full combat capability of most standard opponents.

tiers.name: Captain
tiers.loreDesc: Shinigami who have achieved Bankai and command a Gotei 13 division.
tiers.systemDesc: High-capability nodes with maximum output combat modes.

tiers.name: Lieutenant
tiers.loreDesc: Captain's second-in-command with Shikai but not Bankai.

tiers.name: Seated Officer
tiers.loreDesc: Standard Shinigami officers with basic Zanpakuto access.

factions.name: Gotei 13
factions.loreDesc: The 13 squads of Soul Society's military — the most powerful shinigami organization, with 13 captain-level commanders.
factions.systemDesc: A 13-node distributed military network with hierarchical command structure and individual captain autonomy.

factions.name: Espada (Arrancar Army)
factions.loreDesc: The 10 strongest Arrancar under Aizen's command — each represents a numbered threat level with unique abilities.
factions.systemDesc: A 10-node prioritized military network under Aizen's command, each optimized for specific combat scenarios.

factions.name: Visored (Hollowfied Shinigami)
factions.loreDesc: Shinigami who have gained hollow powers to counter Aizen's Hollowfication research.
factions.systemDesc: A small elite network of hybrid nodes with dual shinigami-hollow capability stacks.

rules.name: Reiatsu Dictates Combat Outcomes
rules.loreDesc: In Bleach, superior Reiatsu effectively invalidates lower-level abilities — if your spiritual pressure is high enough, enemy attacks simply bounce off you.
rules.loreConsequence: High-Reiatsu opponents are nearly immune to abilities from lower-level fighters.
rules.systemEquivalent: A tier-skipping dominance rule: capability ceiling determines matchups more than specific ability matchups.

rules.name: Bankai Cannot Be Used Casually
rules.loreDesc: Bankai is the maximum output state of a Zanpakuto — using it drains significant spiritual energy and leaves the user vulnerable.
rules.loreConsequence: Bankai use is a commitment decision that creates significant post-combat vulnerability.
rules.systemEquivalent: A maximum-performance mode with high operational cost and recovery time.

rules.name: Hollowfication is Contagious
rules.loreDesc: Hollowfication can spread from Hollow to Shinigami — Aizen's research weaponized this into a potential extinction-level threat.
rules.loreConsequence: An unchecked Hollowfication cascade could turn all Shinigami into Hollows.
rules.systemEquivalent: A viral capability transmission that threatens the entire node network.

characters.name: Ichigo Kurosaki
characters.title: Substitute Shinigami
characters.loreBio: A teenager who can see ghosts, whose latent spiritual power attracted Rukia's attention and led to him gaining Shinigami powers.
characters.systemBio: A hybrid node with Shinigami, Hollow, Quincy, and Fullbring capabilities stacked — the most versatile combat platform in the series.
characters.signatureMoment: Bankai release for the first time against Byakuya — demonstrating that his hybrid nature gave him power that startled Soul Society.
characters.keyAbility: Bankai Tensa Zangetsu / Getsuga Tensho / Hollow Mask

characters.name: Aizen Sosuke
characters.title: Shinigami / God Complex
characters.loreBio: The most brilliant Shinigami scientist who faked his own death, created the Arrancar, and sought to overthrow the Soul King.
characters.systemBio: An information-advantage node whose Kyouka Suigetsu creates perfect hypnosis, making every interaction with him unreliable.
characters.signatureMoment: Revealing he was behind everything all along — the most devastating information advantage play in the series.

characters.name: Ulquiorra Cifer
characters.title: Cuarta (4th) Espada
characters.loreBio: The emotionless Arrancar who represents the hollow question: does he have a heart? His battle with Ichigo is the series' philosophical peak.
characters.systemBio: A peak-level combat node with second-stage Resurreccion that exceeds his own captain-level基准.
characters.signatureMoment: Activating his second-stage Resurreccion — a form so powerful even Ichigo in Bankai couldn't counter it.

characters.name: Byakuya Kuchiki
characters.title: Noble / 6th Squad Captain
characters.loreBio: The aristocratic captain who followed the law above all else, until Ichigo forced him to question his principles.
characters.systemBio: A high-capability noble node with Bankai-level output and strict ethical constraints — his principles limit his options in ways that lower-capability but less principled opponents can exploit.
characters.signatureMoment: Ichigo's Bankai being faster than Byakuya's Bankai, forcing him to question whether his pride in his family's techniques was justified.
characters.keyAbility: Bankai Senbonzakura Kageyoshi / Flash Step / Kido Master

relationships: Ichigo's entire shinigami career has been leading toward the confrontation with Aizen — every training, every loss, every power-up was preparation.
A terminal conflict node: Ichigo's development arc is structured around eventually confronting Aizen's god-complex.
The philosophical battle about whether Ulquiorra has a heart — Ulquiorra lost the fight but may have gained something more important.
A philosophical-conflict node that produced mutual transformation: Ichigo unlocked Hollow mask, Ulquiorra discovered emotion.
Aizen manipulated the Gotei 13 for centuries, using their own institutions against them while building the Arrancar army.
A long-term subversion operation: Aizen used his information advantage to position the Gotei 13 as his unknowing pawns.

counterplay: High-level Kido (soul reaper magic) can counter Bankai by interfering with the Zanpakuto's spiritual energy flow.
Soi Fon and other captains use Kido to supplement or counter physical Zanpakuto combat.
A magic-vs-sword counter system that allows non-physical combat capabilities to challenge physical dominance.
The Hollow mask grants Ichigo additional Reiatsu that can overcome opponents who would otherwise outclass him.
Ichigo's Hollow mask lets him compete with opponents whose base Reiatsu exceeds his own.
A temporary Reiatsu amplification that provides tier-skipping capability for short durations.

causalEvents: Aizen creates the Hogyoku and synthesizes it with his own Zanpakuto
Perfect hypnosis becomes his primary tool for manipulating Soul Society for centuries
Centuries before the series — the foundational strategic event
Aizen's creation of Kyouka Suigetsu gave him perfect information advantage over every interaction he's ever had.
A centuries-long information arbitrage operation built on a single capability: no one can trust any perception they've had of Aizen.
Training with the Vizards reveals Ichigo's hybrid nature
Ichigo's Bankai Tensa Zangetsu combines his Shinigami and Hollow powers
Ichigo's Bankai being a combined form of his multiple power sources revealed that his hybrid nature was his greatest strength, not a weakness.
A capability integration event: the combination of multiple power sources created a unique maximum-output state.

anomalies: Aizen's Hogyoku is evolving him beyond Shinigami, Arrancar, and Hollow — he's becoming something unprecedented in Soul Society's history.
A capability ceiling removal event: Aizen's evolution is unbounded by the normal spiritual species categories.
Aizen represents a new category of spiritual entity that Soul Society has no framework to address.
Spiritual species categories — Aizen is becoming something new
Ichigo is revealed to be the son of a Quincy (Isshin) and a Hollow (Masaki), making him a unique triple-hybrid.
A unique multi-species node: Ichigo's genetic composition gives him access to Quincy, Hollow, and Shinigami capability stacks simultaneously.
Ichigo's potential ceiling is theoretically unlimited due to his triple-hybrid nature.
Species-specific power limits — Ichigo bypasses all of them

systemQuestions: Why is Aizen's Kyoka Suigetsu so powerful?
Perfect hypnosis means no one can trust any information from any interaction with Aizen — he's been manipulating everyone for centuries without anyone knowing.
Ichigo's Bankai combines all his power sources (Shinigami, Hollow, Quincy, Fullbring) into a single compressed form — his Bankai is simultaneously all of his abilities at maximum output.
What is the relationship between Reiatsu and combat?

Reiatsu is the fundamental resource: higher Reiatsu generally overrides lower Reiatsu abilities, but specific ability counters (Kido vs Zanpakuto, Hollow vs Quincy) can overcome raw power differences.

hero: Your blade reflects your soul — know yourself to know your power.
Ichigo's hybrid nature is his strength, not a weakness — the combination of Quincy, Hollow, and Shinigami creates a unique combat platform that no single-path opponent can fully counter.
